zh.lifeSummary: 當Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle於大約1178年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪時，他的父親Eustace de Baliol54歲，母親Petronilla FitzPiers17歲。他於大約1195年與Miss Berkeley結婚。他於1228年在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾被列為sheriff of berwick。他去世於1244年在法國皮卡迪索姆圖爾--文享年67歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.Barnard Castle, Durham, England: 英国達勒姆巴納德 卡素

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle于大约1178年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪时，他的父亲Eustace de Baliol54岁，母亲Petronilla FitzPiers17岁。他于大约1195年与Miss Berkeley结婚。他于1228年在苏格兰貝維其可爾被列为sheriff of berwick。他去世于1244年在法国皮卡迪索姆圖爾--文享年67岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ingram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from a medieval given name. This was originally a contracted form of the Norman name Engelram, composed of the ethnic name Engel ‘Angle’ (or Ing, name of the Old Norse fertility god) + hramn ‘raven’. As late as the 17th century Engelram and Ingram were still in occasional use as given names in the north of England.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle was born about 1178, in Aberdeen, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Eustace de Baliol, was 54 and his mother, Petronilla FitzPiers, was 17. He married Miss Berkeley about 1195. In 1228, at the age of 51, his occupation is listed as sheriff of berwick in Berwickshire, Scotland. He died in 1244, in Tours-en-Vimeu, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 67, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle est né environ 1178, à Aberdeen, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Eustace de Baliol, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Petronilla FitzPiers, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Miss Berkeley environ 1195. En 1228, à l’âge de 51 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of berwick à Berwickshire, Écosse. Il est décédé en 1244, à Tours-en-Vimeu, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle um 1178 in Aberdeen, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eustace de Baliol 54 und seine Mutter Petronilla FitzPiers 17. Er hat um 1195 Miss Berkeley geheiratet. 1228, als er 51 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of berwick in Berwickshire, Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb 1244 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Tours-en-Vimeu, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle è nato il circa 1178 nel Aberdeen, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Eustace de Baliol, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Petronilla FitzPiers, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Miss Berkeley circa 1195. Nel 1228, all'età di 51 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of berwick nel Berwickshire, Scotland. Morì nel 1244, nel Tours-en-Vimeu, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastleが約1178年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンで生まれた時，父Eustace de Baliolは54歳，母Petronilla FitzPiersは17歳であった。約1195年にMiss Berkeleyと結婚した。1228年，51歳の時，スコットランドバーウィクシュアイアでの職業はsheriff of berwickと記録されている。彼は1244年にフランスピカーディソンメトウルス-エン-ヴィメウで67歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle(이)가 대략 1178년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eustace de Baliol(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Petronilla FitzPiers(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1195년 Miss Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 1228년, 51세의 나이로 그의 직업은 스컷랜드 버윅실르에서 sheriff of berwick이었다. 그는 1244년 프랑스 피카디 솜 토우르스--비우에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle nasceu aproximadamente 1178, em Aberdeen, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Eustace de Baliol, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Petronilla FitzPiers, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Miss Berkeley aproximadamente 1195. Em 1228, com 51 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of berwick em Berwickshire, Scotland. Ele faleceu em 1244, em Tours-en-Vimeu, Somme, Picardie, França, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle родился около 1178 г. в местности абирдин, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Eustace de Baliol было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Petronilla FitzPiers, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Miss Berkeley около 1195 г. В 1228 году, в возрасте 51 год,  он работал по профессии sheriff of berwick в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия. Он умер в 1244 г. в местности тоурс-ен-вимеу, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ingram de Balliol Lord of Redcastle nació aproximadamente 1178, en Aberdeen, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Eustace de Baliol, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Petronilla FitzPiers, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Miss Berkeley aproximadamente 1195. En 1228, a la edad de 51 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of berwick en Berwickshire, Scotland. Murió en 1244, en Tours-en-Vimeu, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
